title: Ramadan Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: An addon for Farmer's Delight that adds traditional Ramadan dishes from different countries and decorative blocks.
body:
![RD's logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea8da602c00129ff0b2b51dc1d386f9805dfd168.png)

# 📜About

**Ramadan Delight** is an **add-on for Farmer's Delight** that introduces **new crops, traditional food and decorative blocks to celebrate Ramadan.**

***

# 🌙Features
- Adds  **Parsley, Dates and Chickpeas.**
- Adds a lot of **traditional dishes and desserts** from different **countries**.
- Adds **fanous, tainted windows, drum and other decorative blocks**.
- Adds **Date Palm Tree** that can be found in the **desert** 🌴

🔧 The mod is also fully **compatible** with **Botany, Create, CreateAdditions, Diet, and Serene Seasons (and a lot of other mods)**

Use **JEI** and **Appleskin** for a better experience.

***

# ☕ Support me on Ko-Fi❤️ Ko-fi.com/eggmain

***

# 🔒 Permissions

**Modpacks:** You are welcome to include Ramadan Delight in any public or private modpack. Please provide credit and a link back to the mod’s official page.

**Commercial Use:** Ramadan Delight is not to be used for commercial purposes. This includes selling the mod, offering it as part of a paid service, or using it in monetized content without permission.

**Attribution:** If you feature Ramadan Delight in videos, streams, or other content, please provide proper attribution with a link to the mod’s official page.

Feel free to suggest new ideas or report any bugs on the GitHub repository, or contact me directly.
